file_insights.change_summary: Enhanced prompt template clarity by explicitly specifying 'Write tool' instead of generic 'file creation tools'

patterns_discovered.description: Explicit tool naming in test prompts improves adapter behavior predictability
patterns_discovered.context: Template generation for adapter testing uses inline spec strings

patterns_discovered.description: Test specifications are generated as prompts; clarity of instruction wording directly affects test outcomes
patterns_discovered.evidence: Single line change from 'file creation tools' to 'Write tool' constitutes the entire subtask

gotchas_discovered.description: Vague phrases like 'file creation tools' may cause adapters to use unintended tools; explicit naming prevents ambiguity

approach_outcome.description: Update prompt template in test-real-adapters.nu to explicitly mention Write tool

recommendations.rationale: Consistency across all test prompts improves predictability of adapter behavior
